title: PlayPosit Grades in Canvas
content:
Hi Class,

Some people are having issues with PlayPosit videos stating the grades cannot be exported to Canvas. 
please make sure to watch the assigned video as usual, and I’ll ensure your grades are updated on this end.

Best,

Jeremiah
